balance_sim_pilot: PRIME Balance-Sim pilot - this game is the prime candidate for the P2 simulation-driven depth/balancing agent. Thousands of auto-played runs can measure win-rate spread across builds and surface dead / forced / dominant upgrade cards. Card definitions live in src/game/game/cards.ts as a flat, pure data table (id, stat deltas, tags, synergy/anti tags, unlockShards); the run tick + tuning constants live in src/game/game/RunEngine.ts (GAUNTLET_MAX_HP, THREAT_START/PER_STEP/ACCEL/CHIP, BASE_STATS) - BOTH cleanly separable from rendering, so a headless sim drives RunEngine.choose()/resolve() directly with no DOM. A scripted-strategy sim already exists at /tmp during the build; for P2 graduate cards.ts + those constants into balance.json + a thin adapter. Phase-0 sim findings (600 runs x strategy x seed, see DESIGN.md): random(unbuilt) win~18-38% / avgSteps~10-11; focused tank(synTank/greedyGuard) win~73-87%; venom-synergy win~62%; pure-edge-no-sustain is a TRAP win~17-37% (forced trade-offs punish ignoring defense). Multiple builds viable; no >65%-vs-<25% dominant/dead split among reasoned lines. greedyEdge low win% is INTENDED depth, not a dead card - it teaches the sustain trade-off.

idea.title: Drift Blades
idea.hook: Swipe left or right to pick one of two upgrades each step; the run auto-fights and your deck of choices decides if you survive.
idea.hook_ru: Свайпайте влево или вправо, выбирая один из двух апгрейдов; бой идёт сам, а ваша колода решает, выживете ли вы.
idea.prototype: Reigns-style upgrade-picker roguelite. Portrait-first. Each step shows a tilting card offering TWO upgrades - swipe LEFT to take one, RIGHT to take the other. Taking one means the other is gone forever (every pick costs the road not taken). The run auto-resolves a combat/survival tick after each pick (your blades strike, the gauntlet strikes back). Depth = build variety: ~30 upgrade cards across 6 archetypes (Edge/Crit, Guard/Armor, Venom/DoT, Frost/Slow, Greed/Econ, Berserk/Risk) with SYNERGIES (Venom + Frost = Shatter bonus), ANTI-SYNERGIES (Berserk drops Guard, Greed taxes Edge), and forced trade-offs (most cards give one stat and cost another). Survive 20 steps = clear the gauntlet.
idea.mutation_of: Reigns swipe-choice + roguelite-deckbuilder synergies + auto-battler resolve
idea.why_novel: The choice IS the game: no manual combat, no economy grind - just a fast cascade of two-option swipes where synergy/anti-synergy makes each run a different build puzzle. Tactile swipe (card tilt to the chosen side, snap, accept/reject colour wash) is the whole feel.
idea.non_timer_pressure: a depleting Gauntlet threat that rises each step - your defenses must out-scale it or HP hits zero

retention_meta.currency: Shards - earned per run (steps survived + bonus for clearing)
retention_meta.loop: Shards unlock NEW upgrade cards into the draw pool. The starting pool is ~16 cards; ~14 more are locked behind Shard thresholds. Each unlock widens the choice space and adds new synergy lines, so returning runs feel different. Persisted via SaveManager (localStorage), survives reloads.
retention_meta.session_end_hook: run-summary screen shows Shards earned this run + the next card about to unlock (progress bar) - the reason to play one more run

sources.title: swipe left/right the upgrade you choose
sources.snippet: Reigns-style upgrade picker: each step swipe LEFT or RIGHT to pick one of two upgrades, run auto-resolves, depth = build variety + synergies + anti-synergies + forced trade-offs. Portrait-first, swipe is THE input. Retention: meta-currency unlocks new cards into the pool. PRIME balance-sim candidate.

synthesizer_brief: Dedicated single-game build for slot 176. PHASER stack (175 was vanilla, A/B alternation). Build the addictive 10-minute loop around tactile swipe-to-choose and run-to-run build variety. Keep card data as a flat pure table for the future balance-sim.
